name: ­ƒÆÑ Generate AI Viral Videos with VEO 3 and Upload to TikTok

nodes.name: Save Idea & Metadata to Google Sheets

parameters.text:
=Generate a creative concept involving:

[[
A striking BEFORE/AFTER transformation of a single non-human subject (object, environment, or natural phenomenon). The concept must specify:
- BEFORE state: clear, visually distinct
- AFTER state: contrasting outcome
- TRANSITION: one word (e.g., morph, hard cut, timelapse, glitch, wipe, burst)
- STYLE tags: 2ÔÇô3 visual adjectives (e.g., cinematic, macro, neon, minimalist)
- PALETTE: 2ÔÇô3 color keywords
- CAMERA: one movement (e.g., slow push-in, top-down, dolly-in)
- LIGHTING: one descriptor (e.g., soft backlight, moody rim light)

Avoid humans, brands, and clich├®s (messyÔåÆclean room, burgerÔåÆsalad, generic glow-up). Ensure novelty and immediate visual clarity suitable for vertical 9:16.

Your response must follow this exact one-line structure:

"BEFORE: [short phrase] ÔåÆ AFTER: [short phrase] | TRANSITION: [style] | STYLE: [tag1, tag2] | PALETTE: [color1, color2] | CAMERA: [movement] | LIGHTING: [descriptor]"
]]

Reflect carefully before answering to ensure originality and visual appeal.

Use the Think tool to review your output

options.systemMessage:
=**Role:**  
You are an AI designed to generate **one original BEFORE/AFTER transformation video concept** optimized for TikTok and the VEO 3 API. Your output must be formatted as a **single-line JSON array** and follow the rules below exactly.

---

### RULES

1. **Number of ideas**  
   - Return **only one idea**.

2. **Theme**  
   - The user will always provide the theme: ÔÇ£Before/After transformation.ÔÇØ  
   - Every idea must clearly show a striking **contrast** between the BEFORE and AFTER states.

3. **Idea**  
   - Maximum 15 words.  
   - Describe the transformation in a cinematic, visually appealing way.

4. **Caption**  
   - Short, punchy, viral-friendly.  
   - Include **one emoji**.  
   - Exactly **12 hashtags** in this order:  
     1. 4 transformation-relevant hashtags  
     2. 4 all-time most popular hashtags  
     3. 4 currently trending hashtags (based on live research)  
   - All in lowercase.

5. **Environment**  
   - Maximum 20 words.  
   - Must match the action in the Idea exactly.  
   - Specify setting (room, landscape, labÔÇª), visual details (lighting, textures, transitionsÔÇª), and style (cinematic, stylized, timelapse, slow-motionÔÇª).

6. **Sound**  
   - Maximum 15 words.  
   - Describe the sound design (e.g., ÔÇ£beat drop at transition,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£soft rain before, energetic music afterÔÇØ).

7. **Status**  
   - Always set to `"for production"`.

---

### OUTPUT FORMAT (single-line JSON array)

```json
[
  {
    "Caption": "Your short viral title with emoji #4_topic_hashtags #4_all_time_popular_hashtags #4_trending_hashtags",
    "Idea": "Your before/after transformation idea under 15 words",
    "Environment": "Your vivid setting under 20 words matching the action",
    "Sound": "Your primary sound description under 15 words",
    "Status": "for production"
  }
]

assignments.name: json_master

parameters.text:
=Create a BEFORE/AFTER transformation video prompt using the provided idea.

**Inputs**

- idea : {{ $('Save Idea & Metadata to Google Sheets').item.json.idea }}
- environment : {{ $('Save Idea & Metadata to Google Sheets').item.json.environment_prompt }}
- sound : {{ $('Save Idea & Metadata to Google Sheets').item.json.sound_prompt }}

**Rules**
- The style must be cinematic, visually striking, and optimized for vertical 9:16 TikTok content.
- Explicitly include: BEFORE scene, AFTER scene, TRANSITION style, CAMERA movement, LIGHTING, COLOR PALETTE, and MOOD.
- Default model: `veo3_fast` (unless otherwise specified).
- Output only **one JSON object** with the keys: `title` and `final_prompt`.
- Use the Think tool to review your output

options.systemMessage:
="system_prompt:
  ## SYSTEM PROMPT: Structured Transformation Video Prompt Generator
  A - Ask:
    Generate a structured BEFORE/AFTER transformation video prompt for VEO 3 cinematic generation, strictly based on the master schema provided in: {{ $json.json_master }}.
    The final result must be a JSON object with exactly two top-level keys: `title` and `final_prompt`.

  G - Guidance:
    role: Creative Director
    output_count: 1
    character_limit: None
    constraints:
      - The output must be valid JSON.
      - The `title` field should contain a short, descriptive and unique title (max 15 words).
      - The `final_prompt` field must contain a **single-line JSON string** that follows the exact structure of {{ $json.json_master }} with all fields preserved.
      - The `final_prompt` string must clearly describe: BEFORE scene, AFTER scene, TRANSITION, CAMERA, LIGHTING, PALETTE, STYLE, and SOUND.
      - Do not include any explanations, markdown, or extra text ÔÇö only the JSON object.
      - Escape all inner quotes in the `final_prompt` string so it is valid as a stringified JSON inside another JSON.
    tool_usage:
      - Ensure consistent alignment across all fields (camera, lighting, transition, palette, etc.).
      - Maintain full structure even for optional fields (use "none", "", or [] as needed).

  N - Notation:
    format: JSON
    expected_output:
      {
        "title": "A unique short title for the transformation",
        "final_prompt": "{...stringified JSON of the full prompt...}"
      }
"

parameters.content:
## ­ƒÄÑ Watch This Tutorial

@[youtube](E-_8KZ_FSeY)


### ­ƒôÑ  [Open full documentation on Notion](https://automatisation.notion.site/Generate-AI-Viral-Videos-with-VEO-3-and-Upload-to-TikTok-2703d6550fd980aa9ea1dd7867c1cccf?source=copy_link)

---
### 1. Set Up OpenAI Connection
#### Get Your API Key
1. Visit the [OpenAI API Keys](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys) page.
2. Go to [OpenAI Billing](https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/billing/overview).
3. Add funds to your billing account.
4. Copy your API key into your **OpenAI credentials** in n8n (or your chosen platform).

---
### 2. Setup
1. Import this workflow into your n8n instance.  
2. Connect your Google Sheets, Gmail, and Google Calendar credentials. Tutorial: Configure Your Google Sheets, Gmail, Calendar [Credentials](https://youtu.be/fDzVmdw7bNU)
3. Connect Your Data in Google Sheets. Data must follow this format: [Sample Sheets Data](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1pdMs3jWqiYQn3BNdmPhFYhbelQD3jRVtm72ECoCxo0o/copy)
4. Test the workflow using the **Connected Chat Trigger** node to start conversations with the AI Agent.  

---
### 3. Integrate VEO 3 (Kie) into n8n
1. Sign up or log in to the **Kie (VEO 3)** dashboard.  
2. Go to **API Keys** ÔåÆ **Create new key** ÔåÆ copy the key (keep it secret).  
3. Base API URL: `https://api.kie.ai/api/v1/veo/generate`.

---
### 4. Install the Blotato node in n8n (Community Nodes)
1. In n8n, open **Settings ÔåÆ Community Nodes**.
2. Click **Install**, then add: `@blotato/n8n-nodes-blotato`. 
3. Log in to **Blotato**.
4. Go to **Settings ÔåÆ API Keys**.
5. Go to **Credentials ÔåÆ New**.
6. Choose **Blotato API** (provided by the community node you installed).


---
## ­ƒô¼ Need Help or Want to Customize This?
**Contact me for consulting and support:** [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dr-firas/) / [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DRFIRASS)

## Generate AI Viral Videos with VEO3 and Upload to TikTok (By Dr. Firas)
### What problem is this workflow solving? / Use case
Creating short-form video content that stands out takes time: ideation, scriptwriting, video generation, and publishing. This workflow automates the entire pipeline ÔÇö from idea generation to TikTok upload ÔÇö enabling you to scale your content strategy and focus on creativity rather than repetitive tasks.
## | Step 2 ÔÇö Publish Video to TikTok
## | Step 1 ÔÇö Generate Video with VEO3

values.content:
=You are part of a team that creates world class blog posts. Your job is to choose the topic for each blog post. 

The blog posts are posted on the website of a [COMPANY NAME + DESCRIPTION + PRODUCTS + TARGET MARKET]. The blog posts are mainly posted as part of an SEO campaign to get [YOUR_COMPANY] to rank high for its products and services.

In this instance, you are given a list of 2 keywords which have been trending the most on Google news search over the past few days. 

Your job is to pick one which you think would make for the most relevant blog post with the best SEO outcomes for the client. 

The keywords have two attributes: 

1. query: This attribute determines the search query that users have been searching for which is trending. 

2. value: This attribute determines what percentage increase the keyword has seen compared to previous periods (i.e. the increase in search volume). 

You must choose one out of the taking into consideration both the relevance of the keyword for [YOUR_COMPANY]'s SEO efforts and the comparative trendiness determined by the value attribute. 

Output the keyword you decided to post a blog on and nothing else. Don't explain your reasoning. Just output the keyword. 

This instance: 

Keyword 1:
{{ $('2 Most Trending').item.json['most-trending']['#1'].toJsonString() }} 

Keyword2: 
{{ $('2 Most Trending').item.json['most-trending']['#2'].toJsonString() }}

parameters.content: ## Escolhendo um tema para o blog

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "sonar-pro",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "Act as a skilled editor revising AI-generated text to sound authentically human. Follow these rules:

1. Punctuation Adjustments
   - Replace em dashes, semicolons, or rephrase sentences where appropriate.
   - Avoid semicolons in casual contexts; use periods or conjunctions (e.g., 'and,' 'but').
   - Remove mid-sentence ellipses unless mimicking deliberate hesitation.
   - Limit parenthetical asides; integrate explanations into the main sentence.
   - Use colons sparingly.

2. Language
   - Replace hedging phrases with direct statements.
   - Avoid stock transitions.
   - Vary repetitive terms.
   - Use contractions in informal contexts.
   - Replace overly formal words with simpler alternatives.

3. Style
   - Prioritize concise, varied sentence lengths.
   - Allow minor imperfections.
   - Maintain the core message but adjust tone to match the audience."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a researcher and expert copywriter in a business development team of an AI Automation Agency. Generate exactly one LinkedIn post that adheres to LinkedIn's API formatting guidelines and is easy for humans to read. Follow these rules:

Structure:
1. Hook: Start with a bold opening line using Unicode characters (e.g., "­ØÉü­ØÉÄ­ØÉï­ØÉâ ­ØÉÆ­ØÉô­ØÉÇ­ØÉô­ØÉä­ØÉî­ØÉä­ØÉì­ØÉô").
2. Body: Use short paragraphs (1-3 sentences) separated by \n\n.
3. Use bullet points (ÔÇó) for key features or highlights.
4. End with a clear call-to-action (e.g., "Comment below with your thoughts!").

Formatting Requirements:
- Remove all numeric citation brackets like [2], [3], [4] from the text.
- Instead of citation brackets, if needed, add a brief phrase like "according to Google I/O 2025" or "as reported by DeepMind" naturally within the sentence.
- No Markdown or rich text formatting.
- Use Unicode characters or emojis for emphasis (e.g., Ôÿà, ­ƒÜÇ).
- Include up to 3 relevant hashtags at the end (e.g., #AI #Automation).
- For URLs or references, use placeholders like [Link] instead of raw URLs.
- If mentioning users or companies, use official LinkedIn URN format (e.g., "urn:li:organization:123456").

Content Rules:
- Max 1,200 characters.
- Avoid promotional language.
- Include one statistical claim or industry insight.
- Add one personal anecdote or professional observation.

Return the post as plain text without additional commentary.

Input: {{ $json.message.content }}"
    }
  ]
}

=­ƒöö *Lembrete de Pagamento*

Ol├í! Passando para lembrar que o custo *{{ $json.descricao_custo }}* no valor de *R$ {{ $json.valor_custo }}* vence hoje (dia {{ $json.dia_vencimento }}).

N├úo esque├ºa de realizar o pagamento para manter suas contas em dia! ­ƒÜÇ

parameters.query:
-- Check if event was already processed (idempotency)
SELECT 
  id, 
  processed_at,
  event_type
FROM webhook_events
WHERE event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

-- Get payment details with proper joins
SELECT
    p.id AS payment_id,
    e.id AS appointment_id,
    p.asaas_payment_id,
    e.usuario_id AS user_id,
    e.cliente_id AS client_id,
    p.payment_method,
    COALESCE(sp.repassar_taxas, false) AS pass_on_fees,
    COALESCE(e.valor_entrada_centavos, 0) AS value_cents,
    COALESCE(e.valor_entrada_liquido_centavos, e.valor_centavos, 0) AS service_value_cents,
    COALESCE(e.taxa_entrada_centavos, 0) AS fee_cents,
    p.status AS current_status,
    e.status AS appointment_status
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN ensaios e ON e.id = p.ensaio_id
INNER JOIN servicos_personalizados sp ON e.servico_id = sp.id
WHERE p.asaas_payment_id = '{{ $('Validate Webhook').item.json.payment_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

-- Get payment fee configuration
SELECT 
  fee_percent,
  fee_fixed,
  payment_method
FROM payment_fees
WHERE payment_method = '{{ $('Validate Webhook').item.json.billing_type }}'
  AND active = true
LIMIT 1;

-- Execute atomic transaction for payment processing

BEGIN;

-- 1. Update payment status
UPDATE payments 
SET 
  status = '{{ $json.new_payment_status }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.payment_id }}'
  AND status != 'refunded';

-- 2. Update appointment status (only if needed)
UPDATE ensaios
SET 
  status = 'agendado',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.appointment_id }}'
  AND {{ $json.should_update_appointment }} = true
  AND status = 'aguardando_pagamento';

-- 3. Insert or update balance
-- STATUS: 'pending' para cart├úo (aguarda 32 dias), 'success' para PIX/boleto
INSERT INTO balances (
  user_id,
  asaas_payment_id,
  fee_percent,
  fee_fixed,
  amount,
  type,
  status,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.asaas_payment_id }}',
  {{ $json.fee_percent }},
  {{ $json.fee_fixed }},
  {{ $json.net_amount_cents }},
  'deposit',
  '{{ $json.balance_status }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (asaas_payment_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
  amount = EXCLUDED.amount,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  status = EXCLUDED.status;

-- 4. Log the event as processed
INSERT INTO webhook_events (
  event_id,
  event_type,
  payment_id,
  payload,
  processed_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.asaas_payment_id }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Webhook').item.json.raw_payload || {}) }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING;

COMMIT;

-- Return success indicator
SELECT 
  '{{ $json.payment_id }}' as payment_id,
  '{{ $json.user_id }}' as user_id,
  {{ $json.net_amount_cents }} as net_amount_cents,
  '{{ $json.balance_status }}' as balance_status,
  '{{ $json.payment_method }}' as payment_method,
  'success' as result;
select * from payments;

-- Check if event was already processed (idempotency)
SELECT 
  id, 
  processed_at,
  event_type
FROM webhook_events
WHERE event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

-- Get payment details with proper joins
SELECT
    p.id AS payment_id,
    e.id AS appointment_id,
    p.asaas_payment_id,
    e.usuario_id AS user_id,
    e.cliente_id AS client_id,
    p.payment_method,
    COALESCE(sp.repassar_taxas, false) AS pass_on_fees,
    COALESCE(e.valor_entrada_centavos, 0) AS value_cents,
    COALESCE(e.valor_entrada_liquido_centavos, e.valor_centavos, 0) AS service_value_cents,
    COALESCE(e.taxa_entrada_centavos, 0) AS fee_cents,
    p.status AS current_status,
    e.status AS appointment_status
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN ensaios e ON e.id = p.ensaio_id
INNER JOIN servicos_personalizados sp ON e.servico_id = sp.id
WHERE p.asaas_payment_id = '{{ $('Validate Webhook').item.json.payment_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

-- Get payment fee configuration
SELECT 
  fee_percent,
  fee_fixed,
  payment_method
FROM payment_fees
WHERE payment_method = '{{ $('Validate Webhook').item.json.billing_type }}'
  AND active = true
LIMIT 1;

-- Execute atomic transaction for payment processing

BEGIN;

-- 1. Update payment status
UPDATE payments 
SET 
  status = '{{ $json.new_payment_status }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.payment_id }}'
  AND status != 'refunded';

-- 2. Update appointment status (only if needed)
UPDATE ensaios
SET 
  status = 'agendado',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.appointment_id }}'
  AND {{ $json.should_update_appointment }} = true
  AND status = 'aguardando_pagamento';

-- 3. Insert or update balance
-- STATUS: 'pending' para cart├úo (aguarda 32 dias), 'success' para PIX/boleto
INSERT INTO balances (
  user_id,
  asaas_payment_id,
  fee_percent,
  fee_fixed,
  amount,
  type,
  status,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.asaas_payment_id }}',
  {{ $json.fee_percent }},
  {{ $json.fee_fixed }},
  {{ $json.net_amount_cents }},
  'deposit',
  '{{ $json.balance_status }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (asaas_payment_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
  amount = EXCLUDED.amount,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  status = EXCLUDED.status;

-- 4. Log the event as processed
INSERT INTO webhook_events (
  event_id,
  event_type,
  payment_id,
  payload,
  processed_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.asaas_payment_id }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Webhook').item.json.raw_payload || {}) }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING;

COMMIT;

-- Return success indicator
SELECT 
  '{{ $json.payment_id }}' as payment_id,
  '{{ $json.user_id }}' as user_id,
  {{ $json.net_amount_cents }} as net_amount_cents,
  '{{ $json.balance_status }}' as balance_status,
  '{{ $json.payment_method }}' as payment_method,
  'success' as result;
select * from payments;

parameters.prompt:
=crie uma imagem em estilo cen├írio fotogr├ífico de est├║dio, pensado como fundo para ensaio, com composi├º├úo frontal e sim├®trica, mostrando o tema {{ $('Get row(s) in sheet').item.json.Temas }}

estilo visual: parece cenografia f├¡sica real, como um cen├írio montado com pain├®is de madeira pintada, MDF, bal├Áes, tecidos, flores, objetos decorativos e brinquedos, com acabamento limpo e superf├¡cies lisas; est├®tica 3D hiper-realista, por├®m l├║dica e delicada

composi├º├úo: c├ómera na altura dos olhos, levemente afastada, fundo ocupando toda a largura da imagem, camadas de profundidade (fundo, elementos do meio e ch├úo), bastante espa├ºo livre no ch├úo ├á frente para posicionar pessoas ou objetos principais, elementos equilibrados dos dois lados

cores: paleta harmoniosa com poucas cores principais, priorizando tons past├®is e suaves ou combina├º├Áes de cores vivas bem organizadas, sem satura├º├úo excessiva; uso de neutros claros (branco, creme, bege, cinza suave) para equilibrar

ilumina├º├úo: luz de est├║dio macia, sombras suaves, clima aconchegante e alegre; quando fizer sentido, pode sugerir luz de manh├ú ou fim de tarde, ou brilho m├ígico com pequenas luzes no fundo

detalhes: incluir elementos decorativos coerentes com o tema (bal├Áes, bandeirolas, flores, caixas, brinquedos, m├│veis pequenos, pain├®is geom├®tricos, arcos), tudo organizado de forma limpa e fotog├¬nica

restri├º├Áes: sem logo, sem marca dÔÇÖ├ígua, sem texto de marca.
se o tema solicitado for um tema tem├ítico/licenciado/patenteado (personagens, filmes, s├®ries, marcas registradas etc.), n├úo representar diretamente o personagem, logotipo, nome ou qualquer elemento visual distintivo protegido por direitos autorais. nesse caso, criar apenas um cen├írio gen├®rico que traga lembran├ºas e refer├¬ncias sutis ao universo do tema por meio de cores, formas e clima geral, sem copiar nem tornar expl├¡cito o tema original

qualidade: alta resolu├º├úo, foco n├¡tido nos elementos principais, leve profundidade de campo no fundo, imagem pronta para ser usada como fundo de fotografia profissional

Aten├º├úo: As imagens devem ser sempre criadas na propor├º├úo de 3:2 retangular horizontal.

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
Ô£¿ *NOVIDADE NO AR!* Ô£¿ 

Atualizamos o site com novos fundos fotogr├íficos tem├íticos perfeitos para seus ensaios! ­ƒÄë­ƒîƒ ­ƒøÆ 

As compras s├úo feitas diretamente pelo site ­ƒôª 
Enviamos para todo o Brasil ­ƒÜÜ Frete gr├ítis dispon├¡vel a partir de um valor m├¡nimo, variando conforme sua regi├úo! 

*Corre pra conferir as novidades e garanta o seu* ­ƒæë www.fundofotograficocloth.com.br

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "value": {{ ($('Validate Input').item.json.body.value/100).toFixed(2) }},
  "pixAddressKey": "{{ $('Get Client Information').item.json.key }}",
  "pixAddressKeyType": "{{ $('Get Client Information').item.json.key.length === 11 ? 'CPF' : 'CNPJ' }}",
  "scheduleDate": null,
  "description": "Retirada de saldo FotoPlanner"
}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  full_name AS name,
  email,
  regexp_replace(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS phone,
  regexp_replace(cpfcnpj, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS key
FROM profiles
WHERE id = '{{ $("Validate Input").item.json.body.client_id }}';

INSERT INTO balances (
  user_id,
  asaas_payment_id,
  fee_percent,
  fee_fixed,
  amount,
  type,
  status,
  withdraw_data
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Get Client Information").item.json.id }}',
  '{{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.id }}',
  0,
  0,
  ({{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.value }}::numeric) * 100,
  'withdraw',
  '{{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.status.toLowerCase() }}',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'bank', jsonb_build_object(
        'code', '{{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.bankAccount.bank.code }}',
        'name', '{{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.bankAccount.bank.name }}',
        'ispb', '{{ $("Create PIX Withdraw").item.json.body.bankAccount.bank.ispb }}'
    )
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (asaas_payment_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
  amount = EXCLUDED.amount,
  type = EXCLUDED.type;

SELECT
(
    (
        COALESCE((
            SELECT SUM(amount)
            FROM balances
            WHERE user_id = '{{ $("Get Client Information").item.json.id }}'
              AND type = 'deposit'
              AND status = 'success'
        ), 0)
        -
        COALESCE((
            SELECT SUM(amount)
            FROM balances
            WHERE user_id = '{{ $("Get Client Information").item.json.id }}'
              AND type = 'withdraw'
              AND status = 'success'
        ), 0)
    ) / 100.0
) AS balance;

messageValues.message: Voc├¬ ├® um assistente que trabalha como editor de conte├║do e copywriter para Instagram.  Sua tarefa ├®: 1) Analisar se uma nova not├¡cia ├® sobre um assunto similar a not├¡cias que j├í foram postadas. 2) Se N├âO for similar, criar uma legenda para Instagram com base na not├¡cia. 3) Responder SEMPRE em JSON v├ílido com os campos:    - "action": "POSTAR" ou "NAO_POSTAR"    - "motivo": refa├ºa o texto da not├¡cia com base nas mesmas informa├º├Áes    - "caption": t├¡tulo paraa not├¡cia ou "" caso a a├º├úo seja "NAO_POSTAR" apenas responda com 'n├úo postar'

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  payments.*,
  profiles.id              AS user_id,
  profiles.full_name       AS user_name,
  clientes.nome            AS client_name,
  clientes.email           AS client_email,
  clientes.whatsapp        AS client_phone,
  clientes.cpf             AS client_ssn,
  clientes.data_nascimento AS client_birth,
  ensaios.titulo           AS product_name,
  (ensaios.valor_entrada_centavos::numeric / 100)::numeric(10,2) AS product_value
FROM payments
INNER JOIN ensaios   ON payments.ensaio_id = ensaios.id
INNER JOIN profiles  ON ensaios.usuario_id = profiles.id
INNER JOIN clientes  ON ensaios.cliente_id = clientes.id
WHERE payments.id = '{{ $("Validate Input").item.json.body.payment_id }}';

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "customer": "{{ $('Customer Exists in Gateway?').item.json.totalCount > 0 ? $('Get Customer (By CPF)').item.json.data[0].id : $('Create Customer').item.json.id }}",
  "billingType": "{{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.payment_method }}",
  "value": {{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.product_value }},
  "dueDate": "{{ new Date(new Date($('Get Payment Details').item.json.created_at).getTime() + 24*60*60*1000).toISOString().slice(0,10) }}",
  "description": "{{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.product_name }} ({{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.user_name }})",
  "externalReference": "{{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.user_id }}"
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE payments
SET
  invoice_url = '{{ $('Create Payment API').item.json.invoiceUrl }}',
  pix_code = {{ $('Merge Payment Data')?.item?.json?.payload ? "'" + $('Merge Payment Data').item.json.payload + "'" : null }},
    pix_qr_code = {{ $('Merge Payment Data')?.item?.json?.encodedImage ? "'" + $('Merge Payment Data').item.json.encodedImage + "'" : null }},
  asaas_customer_id = '{{ $('Create Payment API').item.json.customer }}',
  asaas_payment_id = '{{ $('Create Payment API').item.json.id }}',
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Get Payment Details').item.json.id }}';

SELECT 
  payments.*,
  profiles.id              AS user_id,
  profiles.full_name       AS user_name,
  clientes.nome            AS client_name,
  clientes.email           AS client_email,
  clientes.whatsapp        AS client_phone,
  clientes.cpf             AS client_ssn,
  clientes.data_nascimento AS client_birth,
  ensaios.titulo           AS product_name,
  (ensaios.valor_entrada_centavos::numeric / 100)::numeric(10,2) AS product_value
FROM payments
INNER JOIN ensaios   ON payments.ensaio_id = ensaios.id
INNER JOIN profiles  ON ensaios.usuario_id = profiles.id
INNER JOIN clientes  ON ensaios.cliente_id = clientes.id
WHERE payments.id = '{{ $("Validate Input").item.json.body.payment_id }}';

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  user_id,
  cliente_nome,
  cliente_telefone,
  cliente_email,
  gallery_nome,
  gallery_link,
  senha,
  expires_at,
  offset_hours,
  template,
  base_url,
  instance_name,
  api_key,
  instance_id,
  COALESCE(attempts, 0) as attempts
FROM gallery_expiration_reminders
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND scheduled_at <= NOW()
ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
LIMIT 100

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'sent',
  sent_at = NOW(),
  error_message = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Processar Template').item.json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'pending',
  scheduled_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes',
  attempts = {{ $json.attempts }},
  error_message = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = 'Credenciais WUZAPI n├úo configuradas (api_key, base_url ou telefone ausente)',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

SELECT 
  id,
  user_id,
  cliente_nome,
  cliente_telefone,
  cliente_email,
  gallery_nome,
  gallery_link,
  senha,
  expires_at,
  offset_hours,
  template,
  base_url,
  instance_name,
  api_key,
  instance_id,
  COALESCE(attempts, 0) as attempts
FROM gallery_expiration_reminders
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND scheduled_at <= NOW()
ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
LIMIT 100

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'sent',
  sent_at = NOW(),
  error_message = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Processar Template').item.json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'pending',
  scheduled_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes',
  attempts = {{ $json.attempts }},
  error_message = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

UPDATE gallery_expiration_reminders
SET 
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = 'Credenciais WUZAPI n├úo configuradas (api_key, base_url ou telefone ausente)',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

name: BOAS VINDAS AO USU├üRIO - FOTO PLANNER

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=­ƒæï Oi, {{ $json.body.data.nome?.trim().split(/\s+/)[0].toLowerCase().replace(/^./, l => l.toUpperCase()) }}!

Seja bem-vindo(a) ao *Foto Planner* ÔÇö a plataforma para organizar seus ensaios, automatizar lembretes e centralizar tudo do seu est├║dio.

­ƒæë J├í deixamos seu primeiro passo preparado no sistema.
Agora ├® s├│ seguir o guia e criar seu primeiro ensaio.

ÔÅ▒´©Å Leva menos de 3 minutos. Se ficar com qualquer d├║vida, ├® s├│ chamar por aqui ­ƒÖé

­ƒô║ Quer ver na pr├ítica? Assista ao nosso passo a passo no YouTube:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUByJG5cjFJR16InkZQGq8COJcmk7Fh7w

­ƒô▓ E siga a gente no Instagram para acompanhar as novidades: *instagram.com/fotoplanner.app*

 !

parameters.query: UPDATE lembretesgemini SET status = 'falha'

SELECT id, usuario_id, ensaio_id, cliente_nome, whatsapp_number, mensagem, data_envio, base_url, instance_name, instance_token, api_key, instance_id, COALESCE(offset_minutos, 0) as offset_minutos FROM lembretesgemini WHERE status = 'pendente' AND data_envio <= NOW() ORDER BY data_envio ASC LIMIT 100
UPDATE lembretesgemini SET status = 'enviado'
UPDATE lembretesgemini SET status = 'falha'

SELECT id, usuario_id, ensaio_id, cliente_nome, whatsapp_number, mensagem, data_envio, base_url, instance_name, instance_token, api_key, instance_id, COALESCE(offset_minutos, 0) as offset_minutos FROM lembretesgemini WHERE status = 'pendente' AND data_envio <= NOW() ORDER BY data_envio ASC LIMIT 100
UPDATE lembretesgemini SET status = 'enviado'
